creator: davidheinrichplanner@googlemail.com
text:
Created attachment 182653
pkg info

get an error by building www/webkit2-gtk3 (i want to upgrade my ports with portmaster)

 uname -a
FreeBSD wst00029 10.3-RELEASE-p18 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p18 #0: Tue Apr 11 10:31:00 UTC 2017     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

make.conf
FORCE_PKG_REGISTER="YES"
WITH_PKGNG="YES"
DISABLE_VULNERABILITIES="YES"
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE="YES"

DEFAULT_VERSION+=ghostscript=9

CC=/usr/local/bin/clang39
CXX=/usr/local/bin/clang++39
CPP=/usr/local/bin/clang-cpp39

test it with clan40 too :(


[143/5280] : && /usr/local/bin/clang++39  -O2 -pipe -DNDEBUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-exceptions -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-rtti -std=c++1y -fcolor-diagnostics -Qunused-arguments -O2 -pipe -DNDEBUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector @CMakeFiles/LLIntOffsetsExtractor.rsp  -o bin/LLIntOffsetsExtractor  && :
